raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the cup and there is free space on the table to push the cup away from the boxes without colliding with box_1 or box_2; pushing is preferred to avoid grasping if the cup is very close to the attached boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is displaced to a clear area on the table, increasing free approach space in front of and around box_2/box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has lateral access to box_1 without contacting the cup; box_2 is attached to box_1 so stabilizing box_1 reduces unintended rotation/drag during the grasp with the other arm.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is constrained against the table surface and lateral motion is reduced, enabling a safer two-arm operation on the attached assembly."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance on the right side of box_1 (or its accessible faces) for the right end-effector to establish a firm non-claw grasp suitable for a 30x30x30 cm box; the left arm is already stabilizing to counteract forces from the attached box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "The right end-effector has a secure hold on box_1 (darker box) and box_1 is under robot control, ready to be lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have access to opposite sides of box_1 and nearby objects (cup, box_2) are not in the immediate lift path; dual-arm support is required because the box exceeds the claw size limit and is attached to box_2, increasing load/torque.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely supported by both end-effectors with balanced contact, enabling a stable lift without slipping."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_1 and there is a clear, stable placement region on the table (e.g., center area) away from the displaced cup; the placement surface is unobstructed and can support the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is placed down on a clear area of the table and released; the darker box has been successfully picked up and repositioned under robot control."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the cup and there is free space on the table to push the cup away from the boxes without colliding with box_1 or box_2; pushing is preferred to avoid grasping if the cup is very close to the attached boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is displaced to a clear area on the table, increasing free approach space in front of and around box_2/box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has lateral access to box_1 without contacting the cup; box_2 is attached to box_1 so stabilizing box_1 reduces unintended rotation/drag during the grasp with the other arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is constrained against the table surface and lateral motion is reduced, enabling a safer two-arm operation on the attached assembly.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance on the right side of box_1 (or its accessible faces) for the right end-effector to establish a firm non-claw grasp suitable for a 30x30x30 cm box; the left arm is already stabilizing to counteract forces from the attached box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The right end-effector has a secure hold on box_1 (darker box) and box_1 is under robot control, ready to be lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have access to opposite sides of box_1 and nearby objects (cup, box_2) are not in the immediate lift path; dual-arm support is required because the box exceeds the claw size limit and is attached to box_2, increasing load/torque.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely supported by both end-effectors with balanced contact, enabling a stable lift without slipping.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_1 and there is a clear, stable placement region on the table (e.g., center area) away from the displaced cup; the placement surface is unobstructed and can support the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is placed down on a clear area of the table and released; the darker box has been successfully picked up and repositioned under robot control.
